narrative:
Urbana City has 7,106 registered voters, with 58.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.5 percentage points.
